description: Worker trust state projection seed — defines trustScore defaults per worker class and scheduling implications.

runtime-feature.note: Requires green main; changes affect runtime behavior.

foundation-fix.note: Always permitted — exists to repair broken state.

docs-contract.note: No runtime impact; safe in yellow state.

health-gate.note: Always permitted — blocking would deadlock recovery.

test-only.note: Blocked in red; test failures may mask real breakage.

refactor.note: Blocked in yellow/red; refactors on unstable base amplify risk.

review-audit.note: Read-only; may run in parallel with feature workers.

merge-release.note: Depends on feature completion; green main required.

inputs.name: mainHealthState
inputs.description: Current main branch health from main-health.json. Green adds trust, red/black subtracts.

inputs.name: workerClassDefault
inputs.description: Baseline trust for the worker class (from this file). Foundation and docs workers have higher defaults.

inputs.name: historicalSuccessRate
inputs.description: Rolling success rate for this worker class over the last 30 days. Derived from agent:done vs agent:running label transitions.

inputs.name: staleWorkerCount
inputs.description: Number of currently stale workers. High count reduces trust for new launches.

inputs.name: conflictGroupLoad
inputs.description: Number of in-flight workers in the same conflict group. Higher load reduces trust.

trustScore.note: Inputs are normalized to [0.0, 1.0] before weighting. The formula is a placeholder — actual computation is delegated to the orchestrator.

rules.description: Do not launch worker. Trust is too low for safe operation.
Launch worker but enable heartbeat monitoring and require review before merge.
Standard launch. Worker proceeds through normal lifecycle.
